hero.label: Made for Domu
hero.headline: I want to help Domu scale AI collections into category leadership.
hero.subheadline: Domu is tackling a massive, operationally painful problem for banks and insurance companies with AI agents that actually drive ROI. I am excited by the chance to join as a founding SDR, learn directly from Nick Diaz, and help turn early traction into a repeatable outbound engine.

whyCompany.title: Domu solves a painful problem with clear enterprise value
whyCompany.body: Debt collection is high volume, repetitive, and hard to staff well, which makes it a strong fit for AI agents. Domu's focus on intelligent servicing for banks and insurers stands out because the pain is urgent, measurable, and tied directly to revenue recovery.

whyCompany.title: Hypergrowth makes this a rare early sales seat
whyCompany.body: Going from 0 to $1M ARR in 10 months shows strong product demand and founder-led selling momentum. Joining at this point means helping build the outbound motion while the company is still small enough for every rep to shape process, messaging, and culture.

whyCompany.title: My BDR foundation fits a high ownership sales role
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I was doing cold outreach, running HubSpot and LinkedIn sequences, and helping bring in 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I sharpened my messaging and digital marketing skills in a B2B consulting environment, which would help me communicate Domu's value clearly to complex enterprise buyers.

quote: I want this role because Domu is not just another AI company. It is solving a hard, valuable problem in a market where strong outreach, curiosity, and execution can make a real difference early.
